title: AI & Prompt Engineering
description: Learn how modern AI systems work, master prompt engineering techniques, build AI-powered workflows, and automate repetitive tasks.
overview: Learn how modern AI systems work, master prompt engineering techniques, build AI-powered workflows, automate repetitive tasks, and leverage Generative AI for business, development, marketing, research, and entrepreneurship.
outcomes: Understand the mechanics of LLMs and Generative AI
Build multi-agent workflows and reflection loops
Automate repetitive tasks with n8n and Zapier
Deploy AI assistants and autonomous workflows

curriculum.title: Foundations of Artificial Intelligence
topics: Introduction to AI
What is Artificial Intelligence?
Evolution of AI
Narrow AI vs General AI
Machine Learning vs Deep Learning
Generative AI vs Traditional AI
Large Language Models (LLMs)
Multimodal AI
AI Agents
AI Assistants
AI Search Engines
Overview of models: GPT Family, Claude Family, Gemini Family, Llama Family, DeepSeek Models, Mistral Models
Practical: Compare outputs from multiple models on the same task.

curriculum.title: Understanding Large Language Models
topics: How LLMs Work
Tokens & Context Windows
Training Data & Fine-Tuning
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
Strengths & Limitations: Hallucinations, Bias, Context Loss, Knowledge Cutoffs
AI Safety & Responsible Usage: Ethical AI, Privacy Concerns, Copyright Considerations, Enterprise AI Usage
Practical: Identifying AI mistakes and fact-checking responses.

curriculum.title: Prompt Engineering Fundamentals
topics: Anatomy of a Great Prompt: Role, Context, Objective, Constraints, Output Format
Prompting Techniques: Zero-Shot Prompting, One-Shot Prompting, Few-Shot Prompting
Chain-of-Thought Prompting & Step-by-Step Reasoning
Tree-of-Thought Concepts
Structured Prompt Design: Templates, Frameworks, Reusable Systems
Practical: Transform weak prompts into professional-grade prompts.

curriculum.title: Advanced Prompt Engineering
topics: Advanced Strategies: Persona-Based Prompting, Expert Role Prompting, Multi-Agent Prompting
Self-Critique Prompting & Reflection Loops
Output Optimization: Structured JSON Outputs, Reports, Tables, Research Documents, Presentations
Prompt Libraries: Building reusable prompt repositories
Practical: Create enterprise-ready prompt systems.

curriculum.title: AI for Productivity & Automation
topics: AI-Powered Workflows: Research Automation, Meeting Summaries, Documentation, Knowledge Management
No-Code Automation: Introduction to Zapier, Make, n8n
AI Workflow Design: Trigger → Process → Action
Human-in-the-Loop Systems
Practical: Build an AI-powered business workflow.

curriculum.title: AI Applications Across Industries
topics: Software Development: Code Generation, Code Review, Documentation, Debugging Assistance
Marketing: Content Strategy, Social Media Planning, SEO Research, Ad Copy Creation
Data Analysis: Data Interpretation, Visualization Assistance, Report Generation
Entrepreneurship: Market Research, Business Models, Pitch Deck Creation, Competitor Analysis
Education: Personalized Learning, Study Assistants, Research Support

curriculum.title: Building AI Assistants & Agents
topics: What Are AI Agents? Agent vs Chatbot, Tool Usage, Decision Making
Agent Architectures: Single-Agent Systems, Multi-Agent Systems
Introduction to Agent Frameworks: LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, OpenAI Agents SDK, Google Agent Development Kit
Practical: Build a simple AI assistant workflow.

curriculum.title: Capstone Project
topics: Students choose one of the following live projects:
Project 1: AI Startup Advisor
Project 2: AI Research Assistant
Project 3: AI Content Generation System
Project 4: AI Customer Support Assistant
Project 5: AI Resume & Career Coach

faqs.question: Who is this course for?
faqs.answer: Professionals, founders, builders, and developers looking to multiply their productivity.

faqs.question: Is coding required?
faqs.answer: No coding experience is required. The program is designed for all levels.

title: Full Stack MERN Development
description: Build production-ready web applications using MongoDB, Express, React, and Node.js. Go from zero to deploying production-grade apps.
overview: Learn how modern web applications are built using the MERN Stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js), develop responsive user interfaces, create backend APIs, manage databases, and deploy full-stack applications.
outcomes: Build responsive frontend applications using React
Develop backend APIs using Node.js and Express.js
Implement secure authentication systems & deploy to production

curriculum.title: Web Development Fundamentals
topics: Introduction to Web Development: How the Web Works, Client-Server Architecture, Frontend vs Backend
APIs and Databases Overview
HTML5: Semantic Elements, Forms, Tables, Media
CSS3: Flexbox, Grid, Responsive Design, Modern UI Principles
Practical: Build a responsive landing page.

curriculum.title: JavaScript Essentials
topics: JavaScript Fundamentals: Variables, Data Types, Functions, Arrays, Objects
Modern JavaScript (ES6+): Arrow Functions, Destructuring, Template Literals, Modules
Asynchronous JS: Async/Await, Promises
DOM Manipulation, Events, Forms, Dynamic Content
Practical: Build an interactive web application.

curriculum.title: React.js Frontend Development
topics: Introduction to React: Component-Based Architecture, JSX, Virtual DOM
React Fundamentals: Components, Props, State, Event Handling
Hooks: useState, useEffect
Routing: React Router
API Integration: Fetch API, Axios
Practical: Build a multi-page React application.

curriculum.title: Backend Development with Node.js & Express.js
topics: Node.js Fundamentals: Runtime Environment, Modules, npm Ecosystem
Express.js Server Creation, Routing, Middleware
REST APIs: CRUD Operations, Request & Response Handling, API Testing
Practical: Build a RESTful API.

curriculum.title: Database Management with MongoDB
topics: Database Fundamentals: SQL vs NoSQL, Collections and Documents
MongoDB Basics: CRUD Operations, Queries, Indexing Concepts
Mongoose: Schemas, Models, Validation
Practical: Connect application with MongoDB.

curriculum.title: Authentication & Security
topics: Authentication Concepts: User Registration, Login Systems
JWT Authentication Tokens, Protected Routes
Security Best Practices: Password Hashing, Environment Variables, Basic Security Measures
Practical: Implement login and authentication.

curriculum.title: Deployment & Modern Development Workflow
topics: Git & GitHub: Repository Management, Branching Basics
Deployment: Frontend Deployment, Backend Deployment, Environment Configuration
Modern Development Practices: Debugging, Code Organization, Project Structure
Practical: Deploy application online.

curriculum.title: Capstone Project
topics: Option 1: Student Management System (Auth, Dashboard, CRUD, DB Integration)
Option 2: Job Portal (User Login, Job Listings, Application System)
Option 3: E-Commerce Store (Product Catalog, Shopping Cart, Authentication)
Option 4: Learning Management System (Course Listings, User Management, Progress Tracking)

faqs.question: Will I get a certificate?
faqs.answer: Yes, you will get an industry-recognized certificate of completion after completing the capstone projects.

title: Data Science, Machine Learning & Generative AI
description: Learn the complete Data Science workflow, build machine learning models, and gain practical exposure to Generative AI & LLMs.
overview: Learn the complete Data Science workflow, perform data analysis, build machine learning models, generate business insights, and gain practical exposure to Generative AI and Large Language Models (LLMs).
outcomes: Apply statistical methods to business problems
Understand neural networks and deep learning concepts
Gain practical exposure to Generative AI and LLMs

curriculum.title: Foundations of Data Science
topics: Introduction to Data Science: What is Data Science?, Data Science Lifecycle, Business Applications, Role of Data Scientists
Python for Data Science: Variables, Data Types, Functions, Lists, Dictionaries
Data Science Environment: Jupyter Notebook, NumPy, Pandas Overview
Practical: Data exploration using Python.

curriculum.title: Data Analysis & Visualization
topics: Data Collection: CSV Files, Excel Files, Public Datasets
Data Cleaning: Missing Values, Duplicates, Outliers
Data Transformation
Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA): Univariate Analysis, Bivariate Analysis, Correlation Analysis
Data Visualization: Bar Charts, Line Charts, Histograms, Scatter Plots
Practical: Customer dataset analysis.

curriculum.title: Statistics for Data Science
topics: Descriptive Statistics: Mean, Median, Mode, Standard Deviation
Probability Fundamentals: Probability Concepts, Distributions, Sampling
Business Interpretation: Data-Driven Decisions, KPI Analysis
Practical: Statistical analysis exercises.

curriculum.title: Machine Learning Fundamentals
topics: Machine Learning Overview: Supervised Learning, Unsupervised Learning
Data Preparation: Feature Engineering, Encoding, Feature Scaling
Regression Models: Linear Regression, Polynomial Regression
Classification Models: Logistic Regression, Decision Trees, K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN)
Practical: Build a prediction model.

curriculum.title: Advanced Machine Learning
topics: Model Evaluation: Train-Test Split, Cross Validation, Evaluation Metrics
Ensemble Learning: Random Forest, XGBoost (Introduction)
Clustering: K-Means, Customer Segmentation
Practical: Customer segmentation project.

curriculum.title: Introduction to Deep Learning
topics: Neural Networks: ANN Fundamentals, Activation Functions
Deep Learning Applications: Image Classification, Text Analysis
Practical: Build a simple neural network model.

curriculum.title: Generative AI & Large Language Models
topics: Evolution of AI: Traditional AI, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Generative AI
Understanding LLMs: Tokens, Context Windows, Transformer Architecture, Attention Mechanism
Modern AI Models: Overview of GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, DeepSeek, Mistral
Practical AI Applications: AI for Data Analysis, AI for Research, AI for Business Insights
RAG Fundamentals: Retrieval-Augmented Generation, Knowledge-Based AI Systems
Practical: Build a simple AI-powered data assistant.

curriculum.title: Capstone Project
topics: Project 1: Sales Prediction System (Skills: Data Cleaning, Machine Learning, Visualization)
Project 2: Customer Segmentation Dashboard (Skills: Clustering, Data Analysis, Business Insights)
Project 3: Employee Attrition Analysis (Skills: Classification Models, Feature Engineering, Reporting)
Project 4: AI-Powered Analytics Assistant (Skills: Data Science, LLM Concepts, Insight Generation)

faqs.question: Is Google Colab covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, you'll learn how to run heavy model architectures and training pipelines on Google Colab.

title: Data Analytics & Business Intelligence
description: Learn how to collect, clean, analyze, visualize, and interpret data using Python, SQL, Excel, and Power BI.
overview: Learn how to collect, clean, analyze, visualize, and interpret data using Python, SQL, Excel, and Power BI. Develop dashboards, generate business insights, and build industry-ready analytics projects.
outcomes: Write SQL queries for business insights

curriculum.title: Foundations of Data Analytics
topics: Introduction to Data Analytics: What is Data Analytics?, Analytics Lifecycle, Business Decision Making, Data-Driven Organizations
Types of Analytics: Descriptive, Diagnostic, Predictive, Prescriptive
Role of a Data Analyst: Responsibilities, Industry Applications, Career Roadmap
Practical: Analyze real-world business cases.

curriculum.title: Python for Data Analytics
topics: Python Essentials: Variables, Data Types, Lists, Dictionaries, Functions
Jupyter Notebook Environment: Setup, Notebook Workflow
NumPy Fundamentals: Arrays, Indexing, Slicing, Mathematical Operations, Statistical Operations
Practical: Data manipulation exercises.

curriculum.title: Data Collection & Data Wrangling
topics: Data Sources: CSV Files, Excel Files, Databases, APIs, Public Datasets
Pandas Fundamentals: DataFrames, Data Import & Export, Filtering, Sorting, Grouping
Data Cleaning: Missing Values, Duplicate Records, Data Type Conversion, Outlier Handling
Practical: Clean and prepare a customer dataset.

curriculum.title: Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
topics: Data Exploration: Summary Statistics, Distribution Analysis, Trend Analysis
Correlation & Relationships: Correlation Matrix, Comparative Analysis, Pattern Identification
Business Insights: KPI Identification, Performance Analysis, Insight Generation
Practical: Perform EDA on business datasets.

curriculum.title: Data Visualization & Storytelling
topics: Visualization using Python: Bar Charts, Line Charts, Histograms, Scatter Plots, Box Plots
Data Storytelling: Presenting Insights, Visualization Best Practices, Executive Reporting
Practical: Create visual reports and dashboards.

curriculum.title: SQL for Data Analytics
topics: Database Fundamentals: Relational Databases, Tables, Relationships
SQL Essentials: SELECT, WHERE, ORDER BY, GROUP BY, HAVING
Advanced SQL: JOINS, Subqueries, CTEs, Window Functions
Practical: Extract and analyze business data using SQL.

curriculum.title: Power BI Dashboard Development
topics: Power BI Fundamentals: Data Import, Data Transformation, Data Modeling
Dashboard Development: KPI Cards, Interactive Reports, Slicers & Filters, Drill-Down Reports
Dashboard Design: Layout, User Experience, Business Reporting
Practical: Build an executive-level dashboard.

curriculum.title: AI for Data Analytics
topics: AI-Assisted Analytics: AI for Data Cleaning, AI for SQL Query Generation, AI for Insight Discovery, AI for Report Creation
Tools Exposure: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Microsoft Copilot
Responsible Usage: Validation Accuracy Checks, Data Privacy
Practical: Analyze data using AI-assisted workflows.

curriculum.title: Capstone Project Selection
topics: Project 1: User Engagement Analytics Dashboard (User Activity, Retention, Session Duration, Engagement Metrics)
Project 2: Sales Performance Dashboard (Revenue, Products, Regional Performance, Trends)
Project 3: Vendor Performance Analytics (Delivery Performance, Fulfillment Rates, Vendor Efficiency, Operational KPIs)
Project 4: Marketing Analytics Dashboard (Campaign Performance, Lead Generation, Conversion Metrics, ROI Analysis)

faqs.question: Do I need a math background?
faqs.answer: Basic math is helpful but not required. The program builds intuition step by step.

title: Cloud & DevOps Engineering
description: Master Amazon Web Services from core infrastructure to serverless architectures and cloud-native application deployment with DevOps workflows.
overview: This program trains you in Amazon Web Services — the world's leading cloud platform, alongside core DevOps tools. You'll go from understanding cloud fundamentals to deploying scalable, containerized infrastructure.
outcomes: Architect scalable cloud infrastructure on AWS
Deploy containerized applications with ECS, ECR, and Docker
Build serverless functions with AWS Lambda
Pass AWS Cloud Practitioner exam preparation

curriculum.title: AWS Fundamentals & Core Services
topics: IAM & security
EC2 & VPC
S3 & CloudFront
Route 53 & DNS

curriculum.title: Serverless & Managed Services
topics: AWS Lambda
API Gateway
DynamoDB
RDS & Aurora

curriculum.title: Containers & DevOps
topics: Docker & ECS
ECR
CodePipeline & CodeBuild
CloudFormation & Terraform

curriculum.title: Advanced Architecture & Monitoring
topics: Auto Scaling
Load Balancers
CloudWatch monitoring
Cost optimization

faqs.question: Do I need a DevOps background?
faqs.answer: Basic Linux and networking knowledge helps, but the program covers everything from the ground up.

title: DSA with Python
description: Crack technical interviews with a structured, problem-first approach to Data Structures & Algorithms using Python.
overview: Stop grinding LeetCode blindly. This program gives you a structured, pattern-based approach to master DSA in Python and crack top tech company interviews with confidence.
outcomes: Master all core data structures (Arrays, Trees, Graphs, DP) in Python
Build interview confidence through mock sessions

curriculum.title: Arrays, Strings & Complexity
topics: Big O analysis
Array patterns
Two pointer, sliding window
String manipulation

curriculum.title: Linked Lists, Stacks & Queues
topics: Singly/doubly linked lists
Stack & queue operations
Monotonic stack
LRU cache

curriculum.title: Trees & Graphs
topics: Binary trees
BST
BFS & DFS
Graph algorithms

curriculum.title: Dynamic Programming
topics: Memoization vs tabulation
1D & 2D DP
Knapsack patterns
Practice problems

faqs.question: Which language is used?
faqs.answer: This program is optimized specifically for Python, but the concepts apply universally.

title: Digital Marketing & Growth Strategy
description: Master performance marketing, content strategy, SEO, paid ads, and growth frameworks used by top brands.
overview: Learn modern digital marketing from a builder's perspective — not theory, but real strategies used by fast-growing startups and D2C brands to acquire users at scale using AI-powered modern tools.
outcomes: Run profitable Google & Meta ad campaigns
Build SEO strategies that generate organic traffic
Analyze marketing data in Google Analytics 4
Build marketing funnels and growth loops

curriculum.title: Introduction to Digital Marketing
topics: Digital Marketing Ecosystem: Evolution of Marketing, Traditional vs Digital Marketing
Customer Journey & Marketing Funnel
Modern Marketing Channels: Search, Social Media, Content, Influencer, Email, Performance
Understanding Consumer Behavior: Attention Economy, Buyer Psychology, Trust & Community Building
Practical: Analyze successful brands and creators.

curriculum.title: Branding & Personal Branding
topics: Brand Fundamentals: Brand Identity, Positioning, Voice, Storytelling
Personal Branding: LinkedIn Growth, Founder Branding, Creator Economy, Thought Leadership, Building Authority
Content Pillars & Audience Targeting: Niche Selection
Practical: Create a personal brand strategy.

curriculum.title: Content Marketing & Social Media
topics: Content Strategy: Planning, Calendars, Audience Research
Social Media Platforms: LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, X (Twitter), YouTube, Threads
Short Form Content: Reels, Shorts, Viral Hooks, Retention Strategies
AI-Powered Content Creation: Using ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Canva AI
Practical: Build a 30-day content plan.

curriculum.title: Search Engine Optimization (SEO)
topics: Modern SEO: Search Intent, Keyword Research, On-Page SEO, Technical SEO Fundamentals
AI Search Optimization (NEW 2026): Google AI Overviews, Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), LLM Visibility, Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)
SEO Tools: Google Search Console, Google Keyword Planner, Ahrefs, SEMrush Overview
Practical: Optimize a website page.

curriculum.title: Performance Marketing
topics: Meta Ads: Campaign Structure, Audience Targeting, Retargeting, Lead Generation
Google Ads: Search Ads, Display Ads, Video Ads
Conversion Optimization: Landing Pages, CTA Design, A/B Testing
Practical: Design ad campaigns.

curriculum.title: Email Marketing & Automation
topics: Email Marketing: Lead Magnets, Email Funnels, Newsletter Strategy
Marketing Automation: Introduction to Mailchimp, Brevo, HubSpot, Automation Concepts, Lead Nurturing, Drip Campaigns, Customer Lifecycle
Practical: Build an automated email sequence.

curriculum.title: Analytics & Growth Measurement
topics: Google Analytics 4: Events, Conversions, User Journey Analysis
Marketing KPIs: CTR, CPC, CPA, ROAS, CAC, LTV
Dashboarding: Looker Studio Basics
Practical: Create marketing reports.

curriculum.title: AI in Marketing
topics: AI-Powered Marketing Workflows: Research Automation, Content Automation, Ad Copy Generation, Customer Support Automation
AI Tools Exposure: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, NotebookLM, Canva AI
Ethics & Limitations: AI Hallucinations, Copyright, Responsible Usage
Practical: Create an AI-powered marketing workflow.

curriculum.title: Capstone Projects Selection
topics: Project 1: Launch a Digital Marketing Strategy for a Startup
Project 2: Build a Personal Brand Growth Plan
Project 3: Create a Social Media Campaign
Project 4: Design a Complete Marketing Funnel
Project 5: Create an AI-Powered Marketing System

faqs.question: Is GA4 covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, you'll practice extensively in GA4 lab sessions to analyze user funnels and marketing attribution.

title: Startup & Entrepreneurship
description: From idea to MVP. Learn how to validate ideas, build startup models, create brands, and pitch to investors.
overview: Learn how to identify opportunities, validate ideas, build startup models, create brands, leverage AI tools, develop MVPs, and launch real-world ventures using modern entrepreneurial frameworks.
outcomes: Build startup brands and growth strategies
Understand startup operations and legal basics
Launch and evaluate startup ideas systematically

curriculum.title: Entrepreneurial Mindset & Startup Fundamentals
topics: Understanding Entrepreneurship: Entrepreneur vs Business Owner, Startup vs Traditional Business, Solving Problems at Scale, Innovation & Value Creation
Startup Ecosystem: Founders, Co-Founders, Investors, Accelerators, Incubators
Modern Entrepreneurship: Lean Startup Thinking, Digital-First Businesses, AI-Powered Businesses
Activity: Analyze successful startups and their journeys.

curriculum.title: Idea Generation & Opportunity Identification
topics: Problem Discovery: Finding Real Problems, Market Gaps, Industry Pain Points
Idea Validation: Problem-Solution Fit, Customer Discovery, Early Feedback Collection
Opportunity Assessment: Market Size, Competition Analysis, Industry Trends
Practical: Generate and evaluate startup ideas.

curriculum.title: Market Research & Customer Validation
topics: Understanding Customers: Target Audience, Customer Personas, User Behaviour
Research Methods: Surveys, Interviews, Competitor Analysis
Validation Techniques: Landing Pages, Waitlists, MVP Testing
Practical: Conduct market validation for a startup idea.

curriculum.title: Business Models & Revenue Strategies
topics: Business Model Fundamentals: Business Model Canvas, Value Proposition Canvas
Revenue Models: Subscription SaaS, Marketplace, E-Commerce, Service-Based, Freemium
Unit Economics: Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC), Lifetime Value (LTV), Profitability Basics
Practical: Design a business model for a startup.

curriculum.title: Branding, Marketing & Growth
topics: Startup Branding: Brand Identity, Positioning, Messaging
Digital Presence: Website Essentials, Social Media Strategy, Personal Branding
Growth Strategies: Organic Growth, Community Building, Content Marketing
AI-Powered Marketing: Using AI for Research, Content Creation, Customer Engagement
Practical: Create a startup branding strategy.

curriculum.title: MVP Development & Product Thinking
topics: Product Development Basics: MVP (Minimum Viable Product), Product-Market Fit
No-Code & AI Tools: Exposure to Bolt, Lovable, Replit, Cursor, Canva, Figma
Building Fast Landing Pages, Prototypes, Early Products
Practical: Build an MVP prototype.

curriculum.title: Startup Operations & Legal Basics
topics: Team Building: Co-Founder Selection, Hiring Early Team Members
Business Structures: Sole Proprietorship, Partnership, LLP, Private Limited Company
Intellectual Property: Trademarks, Copyright, Patents (Overview)
Financial Basics: Budgeting, Cash Flow, Startup Expenses
Practical: Startup structure selection exercise.

curriculum.title: Funding & Investor Readiness
topics: Funding Landscape: Bootstrapping, Angel Investment, Venture Capital, Grants
Investor Expectations: Traction, Market Size, Team Strength
Pitch Deck Essentials: Problem, Solution, Business Model, Market Opportunity, Financials
Practical: Create a startup pitch deck.

curriculum.title: Capstone Project (Startup Launch Blueprint)
topics: Students work in teams and build: Startup Launch Blueprint including: Problem Statement, Market Research, Customer Persona, Business Model Canvas, Branding Strategy, MVP Prototype, Go-To-Market Plan, Investor Pitch Deck, Final Presentation

faqs.question: Do I need a technical background?
faqs.answer: No, this program is designed for all aspiring non-technical and technical founders.

title: Advanced Excel & Business Analytics
description: Master financial modeling, macros, Power Query, dashboards, and Excel-based business analytics.
overview: Learn to analyze, clean, visualize, automate, and interpret business data using Microsoft Excel. Develop professional dashboards and reports used across finance, operations, marketing, HR, sales, and management functions.
outcomes: Build Pivot Tables and Pivot Charts

curriculum.title: Excel Fundamentals & Productivity
topics: Excel Environment, Workbook & Worksheet Management
Data Types, Cell Referencing, Named Ranges
Productivity Techniques: Keyboard Shortcuts, Flash Fill
Data Validation, Conditional Formatting
Practical: Build structured spreadsheets efficiently.

curriculum.title: Formula & Function Mastery
topics: Essential Functions: SUM, AVERAGE, COUNT, MAX, MIN
Logical Functions: IF, IFS, AND, OR, SWITCH
Lookup Functions: XLOOKUP, VLOOKUP, HLOOKUP, INDEX, MATCH
Text Functions: LEFT, RIGHT, MID, TEXT, CONCAT, TEXTJOIN
Date & Time Functions: TODAY, NOW, DATEDIF, EDATE, NETWORKDAYS
Practical: Solve real business scenarios using formulas.

curriculum.title: Data Cleaning & Data Preparation
topics: Data Quality: Removing Duplicates, Handling Missing Data
Data Validation & Transformation: Split & Merge Columns, Text to Columns, Flash Fill, Find & Replace
Business Data Preparation: Customer Data, Sales Data, Employee Data
Practical: Clean messy datasets for analysis.

curriculum.title: Pivot Tables & Pivot Charts
topics: Pivot Table Fundamentals, Creating Pivot Tables, Grouping Data, Calculated Fields
Pivot Charting: Dynamic Charts, Interactive Reports
Slicers & Timelines: Interactive Filtering, User-Friendly Dashboards
Practical: Analyze sales and operational datasets.

curriculum.title: Data Visualization & Dashboard Design
topics: Chart Types: Bar, Line, Pie, Combo, Waterfall Charts
Dashboard Principles: KPI Design, Visual Hierarchy, Storytelling with Data
Interactive Dashboards: Slicers, Dynamic Charts, Linked Reports
Practical: Create an executive-level dashboard.

curriculum.title: Power Query & Data Automation
topics: Introduction to Power Query: Importing Data, Transforming Data, Combining Data Sources
Data Automation: Refreshable Reports, Automated Data Cleaning
Business Applications: Monthly Reporting, Sales Analysis, HR Analytics
Practical: Automate repetitive reporting tasks.

curriculum.title: Business Analytics with Excel
topics: Analytical Thinking: Trend Analysis, Growth Analysis, Variance Analysis
KPI Tracking: Sales KPIs, Marketing KPIs, Financial KPIs
Forecasting Basics: Trend Forecasting, What-If Analysis, Scenario Analysis
Practical: Generate business insights from datasets.

curriculum.title: AI & Modern Excel Features
topics: Excel in the AI Era: Microsoft Copilot Overview
AI-Assisted Formula Generation & AI-Assisted Analysis
Productivity Workflows: Excel + AI, Reporting with AI Assistance
Responsible Usage Verification: Data Privacy, Accuracy Checks
Practical: Use AI to accelerate reporting and analysis.

curriculum.title: Capstone Projects Selection
topics: Project 1: Sales Performance Dashboard (KPI Tracking, Regional Analysis, Trend Analysis)
Project 2: HR Analytics Dashboard (Employee Metrics, Attendance Analysis, Attrition Insights)
Project 3: Financial Reporting Dashboard (Revenue Tracking, Expense Analysis, Profitability Reports)
Project 4: Marketing Performance Dashboard (Campaign Metrics, ROI Analysis, Lead Tracking)

faqs.question: Is Power Query covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, Power Query is extensively covered for automated data cleaning workflows.
